overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character walking through a sunny historic residential neighborhood resembling New Orleans, featuring iron-fenced houses, tree-lined sidewalks, and vintage cars. The character passes a pedestrian and turns onto a shaded residential path between houses.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk along main residential street with parked cars

events.description: character walks past the parked green vintage car

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to iron fences and parked vehicles

entered.detail: light green classic sedan parked by the curb
black wrought iron fence along the sidewalk
red brick wall with stone pillars supporting the fence
two-story house with porch visible behind the fence
large oak trees lining the street providing shade

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit sidewalk next to a main residential street, passing a distinctive green vintage car parked by the curb. Iron fences and brick walls line the right side, with historic houses visible behind them, while oak trees cast shadows across the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with historic balcony architecture

events.description: a female pedestrian in a dress walks past in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk, passing a pedestrian and observing the residential architecture with balconies

notable_agents.action: woman in a light-colored dress walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: historic house with prominent iron balcony and white railings

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the residential street, the character passes a woman walking in the opposite direction. The architecture shifts to feature prominent iron balconies on the houses, with the fence and wall receding to mid-distance as the pedestrian interaction occurs.

events.description: character turns left off the main sidewalk onto a residential pathway
approaching street intersection at the end of the residential path

agents.ego_description: turns left onto a shaded path between residential properties, then continues walking toward the next street

entered.detail: narrow paved pathway between houses with dappled sunlight
light pink two-story house with white trim
approaching intersection with visible street and parked white car

segments.scene_description: The character turns left onto a shaded residential path between houses, leaving the main street behind. Dappled sunlight filters through dense tree canopy as the character approaches a street intersection where a white car is visible parked near a fire hydrant.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open residential street into a secluded, shaded neighborhood path. It begins on a sunlit sidewalk where the camera passes a green vintage car parked beside historic brick walls and iron fences. As the character continues forward, the architecture shifts toward houses with prominent iron balconies while passing a woman walking in the opposite direction. The scene then turns left away from the main street, transitioning into a quiet residential path where dappled sunlight filters through a dense tree canopy. Finally, the camera moves toward a street intersection, revealing a white car parked near a fire hydrant.
